prompt: Build a simple solar system: a yellow sphere (sun) at origin, a blue sphere (Earth) at (3,0,0), and a smaller gray sphere (Moon) near Earth at (3.5, 0, 0).

evaluation_rubric.description: Exactly three spheres are created
A yellow sphere is at origin
A blue sphere is at (3,0,0)
A gray sphere is at (3.5,0,0) and is smaller than Earth
Sun > Earth > Moon by visible radius

expected_artifacts: scene with sun, earth, moon arranged correctly

prompt: Create a stack of three cubes (red on bottom, green in middle, blue on top), each 1m on a side, stacked vertically at the origin.

evaluation_rubric.description: Exactly three cubes are created
Bottom is red, middle is green, top is blue
Y positions form a stack with no gaps and no overlap (e.g. y=0.5, 1.5, 2.5 if cubes are size 1)
All cubes are 1x1x1

expected_artifacts: scene with vertical RGB cube stack

prompt: Make a row of 5 white spheres along the X axis spaced 1m apart starting at x=0.

evaluation_rubric.description: Exactly five spheres are created
All spheres are white
X positions are 0,1,2,3,4 (within 0.05)
Y and Z are 0 for each sphere

expected_artifacts: scene with row of 5 white spheres

prompt: Build a basic table: a flat brown box (top) supported by 4 brown cylinder legs at the corners. Top should be roughly 1m x 1m, 0.05m thick, raised 0.7m off the ground.

evaluation_rubric.description: There is one box (table top) of size 1x1x0.05 within 10% tolerance
There are exactly 4 cylinders (legs)
Legs are positioned at the four corners under the top
Top center is roughly at y=0.7
All five parts are brown

expected_artifacts: scene with table consisting of top + 4 legs

prompt: Create a simple traffic light: a vertical black post (cylinder) and three colored spheres on it (red on top, yellow in middle, green on bottom).

evaluation_rubric.description: There is exactly one cylinder acting as a post
Three spheres are present
Top sphere is red, middle yellow, bottom green
Sphere positions form a vertical stack along the post height

expected_artifacts: scene with a traffic light post + 3 colored spheres

prompt: Lay out a chess board: an 8x8 grid of flat squares alternating black and white, each square 1x1, with the bottom-left square at (0,0,0) and the grid lying on the XZ plane.

evaluation_rubric.description: There are 64 flat tiles
Tiles alternate black/white in checkerboard pattern
Bottom-left tile is at (0,0,0) within 0.05
All tiles lie on the XZ plane (y is small/0 for all)

prompt: Create a desk lamp: a wide gray cylinder base (radius 0.2, height 0.05), a thin vertical pole (cylinder, height 0.5), and a small spherical bulb on top emitting light.

evaluation_rubric.description: Wide flat cylinder base exists
Thin vertical cylinder pole exists
A small sphere acts as the bulb on top
Base at bottom, pole on base, bulb on pole
A point light is co-located with the bulb

expected_artifacts: scene with a 3-part desk lamp emitting light

prompt: Place 10 small cubes in a circular ring of radius 2 around the origin in the XZ plane, each cube 0.2m on a side.

evaluation_rubric.description: Exactly 10 cubes
All cubes are 0.2x0.2x0.2
Each cube center sits at radius 2 from origin in the XZ plane within 0.05
Angular spacing is uniform (every 36 degrees) within 5 degrees

expected_artifacts: scene with 10 cubes in a ring

prompt: Build a simple snowman: 3 white spheres stacked vertically, sizes 1.0, 0.7, 0.5 from bottom to top, each centered on Y axis. Add 2 black sphere eyes (radius 0.05) on the smallest sphere.

evaluation_rubric.description: There are exactly 5 spheres
Three white spheres of radii ~1.0, 0.7, 0.5 stacked bottom to top
Body spheres are stacked vertically with surfaces touching (centers offset by sum of touching radii)
Two black spheres of radius ~0.05 placed on the head sphere

expected_artifacts: scene with snowman: 3 body spheres + 2 eyes

prompt: Create a tiny bedroom: floor (10x10 plane), back wall (10x3 plane on -Z side), a bed (1.5x2x0.4 box at one corner) and a nightstand (0.4x0.4x0.5 box next to the bed).

evaluation_rubric.description: 10x10 horizontal plane exists at y~0
10x3 vertical plane exists on -Z side
A 1.5x2x0.4 box (bed) exists in a corner of the floor
A 0.4x0.4x0.5 box (nightstand) is adjacent to the bed
Bed and nightstand do not overlap volumetrically

expected_artifacts: scene with bedroom: floor + wall + bed + nightstand
